title: Everbuild Everflex 500 Bath and Sanitary Silicone, Anti-Fungal Silicone Sealant, White, 295 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Excellent Hygiene Sealant: Specifically designed to seal and protect areas where maximum hygiene protection is required.
Sanitary Safe: Suitable for use in kitchens and bathrooms.
Strong Protection: Strategically incorporating a powerful fungicide into the formula, it provides a strong long-lasting protection against mould growth on the sealant
Water Resistant: Waterproof and flexible properties provide an excellent seal suitable for sealing baths, showers and basins.
Quick Curing Time: A skin will form within 10 minutes after application.
Available in Manhattan Grey, Translucent, Ivory, Sandstone and White.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? Ensure surfaces are clean, dry and free from dust, grease and other contaminants before applying the sealant. Cut cartridge tip, fix nozzle, trim at 45° with an opening slightly wider than the gap to be sealed. Apply with a standard sealant gun, keeping steady pressure and angle for the best sealing results. Smooth down within 10 minutes of application using a sealant smooth down tool and allow the sealant to cure. WHERE TO USE IT?
